positive: A stunning central illustration of bioluminescent cosmic flora and fauna. The color palette should be deep indigo, shimmering teal, ethereal lavender, and glowing golden accents. Designed with a clean, negative space background for maximum print visibility. Style should be a blend of Art Deco symmetry and celestial watercolor, vector art quality, maximal contrast, elegant and meditative mood.
